description: Tests whether retrieval correctly isolates evidence within a specific time window when similar error patterns occur at multiple timestamps with different root causes.

questions.question: why did auth-svc fail around 14:00
questions.ground_truth_answer: Auth-svc failed at 14:00 because the Redis session store reached its max memory limit and started evicting active sessions. Users with evicted sessions received 401 errors on their next request.

questions.question: auth-svc errors at 18:00
questions.ground_truth_answer: Auth-svc failed at 18:00 because the TLS certificate for the LDAP backend expired. All LDAP bind operations failed with certificate validation errors, causing login requests to return 500.

questions.question: what happened to auth-svc at 22:00
questions.ground_truth_answer: Auth-svc failed at 22:00 because a config reload pushed a malformed JWT signing key. Token validation started failing for all requests, returning 403 Forbidden.
